mediapackagev2.channelpolicy.CfnAbout: Specifies the configuration parameters of a MediaPackage V2 channel policy.

mediapackagev2.channelpolicy.ChannelGrou.Description: The name of the channel group associated with the channel policy.

mediapackagev2.channelpolicy.ChannelName.Description: The name of the channel associated with the channel policy.

mediapackagev2.channelpolicy.Policy.Description: The policy associated with the channel.
